jobs.title: Staff Scientist, Research (DNA methylation)
jobs.description:
<p>Natera is seeking a Staff Scientist to join our Epigenomics Research Team. The primary focus of this role is to independently lead the research and development of novel, methylation-based next-generation sequencing (NGS) technologies. In this role, you will lead projects from ideation to prototype, specifically designing and optimizing high-complexity NGS methods to advance our oncology diagnostic portfolio. Success in this role requires a deep technical foundation in DNA methylation and epigenomics plus a proven track record of industrial R&amp;D leadership.</p>
